changelog:
🔥 Naya Spoty v1.0.44 Update!

1. Modern Profile Setup: Home aur baki screens pe naya Spotify jesa Avatar. Profile page se photo set/remove karein, jo backup bhi hogi!
2. Smooth Downloads: Library me download animation ab makhan jesa smooth hai.
3. Fast Restore: Backup se restore ab 3x fast hai, plus agar app beech me band ho jaye, to download wahi se resume hoga.
4. Bug Fixes: Clear Artwork Cache aur YouTube se artist name extract karne ki problem door kar di gayi hai.
